title: Create Alchemist's Industry
description: Alchemical Methods to Master Automation with the Create Mod.
body:
-----Support-----

 

This mod is for Minecraft Forge 1.19.2

 

It as an addon to the Create Mod and works on versions 0.5.*, 

 

Please Download the file ending in Create0.5.1 if you are Create 0.5.1, otherwise a recipe will not function. If you are on Create0.5.0, don't download that one.

 

For supported languages besides English, see the credits, all translators and their translations are there.

 

‐----Descriptions----

 

Through the creation of magical fluids called essences you can transmute items into others, allowing you to push the limits of what's possible with your factory.

 

All essences are fullly automatable, buts its difficult. You can use a new alloy, Pewter to create sigils and duplicate essences allowing for early game use of essences. To get started even easier you can find generated structures to get sigils of essences early.



Essences can be used to make Arcana, a powerful type of energy capable of running new machines, taking your factories to insane levels. You can extract minerals from blocks, mix essences to make powerful fluids to automate even more, or infuse items with arcana itself to automate super valuables like Diamonds and Netherite.

 

This mod also adds some new stone types, mainly Galena which allows you to make lead for pewter, but also Corvium in the nether which provides everything that you usually run out of. And Galaxite in the end, which you need to produce high-level machiens.

 

-----Info-----

 

Join the Discord, this is the main way you can contribute to (and translate) the mod:

 

https://discord.gg/qwAwVfJqYx

 

If you have a bug, please join the discord and add a bug report in the suggestions forum, using the bug tag.

 
-----Credits!------

 

Kelad8_mk_VIII - For the Arcana Infuser, Arcana Radiator, and Arcana Accelerator models

 

Coed - For the item textures (as of 0.2.2.2)

 

Feellian - For creating the Russian translation and texturing the fluids, as well as loose and solid essence blocks

 

Kiberkotla - For Creating the textures for all the Lead Stuff, amethyst powder, impure ghast tear, and gunpowder dusts.

 

YellowHawk - For Building the structures that spawn in game.

 

Happy - For being the GOAT and fixing the server crash

 

Elenterius - Being consistently very helpful when I had questions.

 

BlazeHen - For the Brazilian Portuguese translation

 

Lunarantic - For the following textures: Incomplete Enchanted Golden Apple, and Foaming Slime.

 

Kayla the Bee - Sigil Textures (as of 0.2.0)
